gate_rules: technical trigger required first: ORB (opening-range breakout) preferred, GAPPER fallback after 13:00 ET
fade_risk = false required (primary), OR fade_risk = true admitted only as a daily-trade-target fallback at/after 11:00 ET
hard exclusions regardless of fade_risk: deal_pinned (confirmed M&A), stale_multiday (day 3+, no fresh news), overextended (gap > 4x ATR)
gap_pct >= 5%, price > $3, dollar volume > $500K, float <= 150M shares
